items.title: Red Team Reconnaissance
items.content: Begin every engagement with reconnaissance. Identify exposed services, open ports, known vulnerabilities, and user enumeration paths before attempting exploitation.

items.title: Automation for Incident Response
items.content: Use automation pipelines to collect alerts, triage incidents, and escalate high-risk events. Implement dashboards, automated ticket creation, and response playbooks for consistent handling.

items.title: Secure DevOps Workflow
items.content: Integrate security checks into CI/CD. Automate dependency scanning, secret detection, and infrastructure drift analysis while enforcing standard deployment policies.
